note: Generated by scripts/scrape_sts2_wiki_builds.py; re-run to refresh.

builds.title: Defect Lightning Build
builds.description: Channel Lightning orbs and boost them with Focus for devastating passive damage each turn. Electrodynamics turns every Lightning evoke into AoE. Echo Form doubles your best play each turn for exponential scaling.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defragment
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 1 Focus (2 upgraded). Every copy permanently buffs ALL orbs. Stack aggressively.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Electrodynamics
card_acquisition_priority.note: Lightning now hits ALL enemies. Transforms single-target damage into room-clearing AoE.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Echo Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play the first card each turn twice. Doubles Defragment, damage cards, everything.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capacitor
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 2 Orb slots (3 upgraded). More slots = more passive Lightning damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Ball Lightning
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deal 7 damage + channel Lightning. Efficient damage + orb generation in one card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Storm
card_acquisition_priority.note: Whenever you play a Power, channel 1 Lightning. Free orb generation.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Coolheaded
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Frost + draw 1 (2 upgraded). Defense + card draw.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Subroutine
card_acquisition_priority.note: Innate Power. Channel 1 Lightning and 1 Frost. Consistent start to every fight.

best.name: Cracked Core
best.note: Defect's starter. Channel 1 Lightning at start of combat. Free passive damage from turn 1.

best.name: Mummified Hand
best.note: After playing a Power, a random card in hand costs 0 this turn. Essential for chaining Powers.

best.name: Inserter
best.note: Gain an Orb slot every 2 turns. More slots = more passive Lightning orbs.

good.name: Gold-Plated Cables
good.note: Rightmost Orb triggers its passive an extra time. Double Lightning passive on your oldest orb.

good.name: Data Disk
good.note: Start each combat with 1 Focus. Free Focus that makes every orb better immediately.

good.name: Runic Capacitor
good.note: Start with 3 extra Orb slots. Immediately lets you fill up with Lightning orbs.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Power-heavy builds need to play many cards in setup turns. 6-card limit is painful.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: +1 Strength to enemies is dangerous when you need time to set up orbs and Focus.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses dilute the deck, making it harder to draw Defragment and Echo Form.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Cracked Core
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Mummified Hand
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your Hand is free to play that turn.

builds.title: Defect Claw Build
builds.description: The fan-favorite zero-cost spam deck that cycles through cheap attacks at blazing speed, with Claw's damage permanently ramping every time it's played. All for One retrieves all 0-cost cards from the discard pile for massive combo turns, while Feral doubles up 0-cost card plays. When the machine gets going, nothing can stop the Claw.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Claw
card_acquisition_priority.note: The build's namesake. 0 Energy, permanently ramps +2 damage per play. Take every copy — 3-4 Claws is ideal.

card_acquisition_priority.name: All for One
card_acquisition_priority.note: Retrieves ALL 0-cost cards from discard pile. Enables cycling Claws multiple times per turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Scrape
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 3, discard cards costing 2+. Filters hand to 0-cost cards and cycles through the deck rapidly.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Feral
card_acquisition_priority.note: Power that plays every 0-cost card twice. Effectively doubles all Claw damage and triggers.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Hologram
card_acquisition_priority.note: Retrieves a card from discard. Fetches All for One or Scrape for another combo cycle. Upgrade removes Exhaust.

card_acquisition_priority.name: FTL
card_acquisition_priority.note: 0 Energy attack + draw a card if fewer than 4 cards in play. Keeps the chain going.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Go for the Eyes
card_acquisition_priority.note: 0 Energy Weak application. Reduces enemy damage while being a free Claw-compatible attack.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Panache
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deals 10 AoE damage every 5th card played in a turn. With 10-20 cards per turn, triggers 2-4 times.

best.name: Unceasing Top
best.note: Draw a card whenever your hand is empty. With all 0-cost cards, the deck goes infinite — play everything, draw more, repeat forever.

best.name: Nunchaku
best.note: Gain 1 Energy after every 3 attacks. Claw spam triggers this constantly, generating free Energy for All for One.

best.name: Shuriken
best.note: Gain 1 Strength after every 3 attacks. Each Strength point adds damage to every Claw hit. Scales explosively.

good.name: Kunai
good.note: Gain 1 Dexterity after every 3 attacks. Boosts Block from any defensive cards in the deck.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain 4 Block after every 3 attacks. Free defense while spamming Claws.

good.name: Iron Club
good.note: Draw a card after every 3 attacks. Extra draw keeps the Claw chain going.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: 6 card limit per turn is catastrophic. The entire build relies on playing 10-20+ cards per turn.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomizing costs on a deck full of 0-cost cards is strictly negative.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses bloat the deck and clog Scrape's filtering. Deck efficiency is critical.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Unceasing Top
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Nunchaku
key_relics_sidebar.note: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.

builds.title: Defect Frost Build
builds.description: Become an impenetrable wall of Frost orbs. Generate massive Block passively each turn while your orbs chip away at enemies. The ultimate 'I can do this all day' defensive strategy for the Defect.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defragment
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 1 Focus (2 upgraded). Makes every Frost orb produce more Block. Stack multiple copies.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Glacier
card_acquisition_priority.note: 7 Block + channel 2 Frost. Most efficient Frost generation in one card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capacitor
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain 2 Orb slots (3 upgraded). More Frost orbs = exponentially more passive Block.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Coolheaded
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel 1 Frost + draw 1 (2 upgraded). Defense + draw in one efficient package.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Loop
card_acquisition_priority.note: First Orb triggers passive twice. Double Block from frontmost Frost orb every turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Buffer
card_acquisition_priority.note: Negate the next damage instance. Insurance against attacks that exceed your Block.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Cold Snap
card_acquisition_priority.note: Deal 6 damage + channel Frost. Provides offense while building the Frost engine.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Hailstorm
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Frost whenever you gain Block. Creates chain reactions with Frost-generated Block.

best.name: Cracked Core
best.note: Defect's starter relic. The initial Lightning orb provides early damage while you build Frost.

best.name: Data Disk
best.note: Start every combat with 1 Focus. Immediately improves all orbs from the first turn.

best.name: Inserter
best.note: Gain 1 Orb slot every 2 turns. More Frost slots = more passive Block accumulation.

good.name: Gold-Plated Cables
good.note: Rightmost Orb triggers passive twice. Double Block from your oldest Frost orb.

good.name: Runic Capacitor
good.note: Start with 3 extra Orb slots. Immediately filled by Glacier and Coolheaded for early Block.

good.name: Anchor
good.note: Start combat with 10 Block. Buys time to set up Frost orbs and Focus.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain +1 Strength. More damage to block in already defense-focused build. Unnecessary risk.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Can't earn Gold. Need Gold for shop Defragments and Capacitors.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses in deck dilute draws. Harder to find Defragment and setup cards when needed.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Cracked Core
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.

builds.title: Defect Dark Orb Build
builds.description: Channel Dark orbs that passively grow in damage every turn, then evoke them for devastating single-target nukes. While Lightning chips and Frost blocks, Dark orbs accumulate for one apocalyptic strike. The patient player's ultimate win condition.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Darkness
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel a Dark orb. The primary way to create your damage source. Take 2 copies.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Multi-Cast
card_acquisition_priority.note: Evoke frontmost orb X times. With charged Dark orbs, this is 100+ damage in one play.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defragment
card_acquisition_priority.note: +1 Focus per play. Makes Dark orbs charge 1 more damage per turn. Multiplicative over time.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Consuming Shadow
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Dark + deal damage. Dual purpose card that builds your Dark engine.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capacitor
card_acquisition_priority.note: +2 Orb slots. Need room for Dark orbs AND Frost defense simultaneously.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Loop
card_acquisition_priority.note: First orb triggers passive twice. If Dark is first, double charging per turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Echo Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: Double your first card each turn. Double Multi-Cast = evoke Dark orb 6+ times.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Coolheaded
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Frost + draw. Provides defense while you wait for Dark orbs to charge.

best.name: Cracked Core
best.note: Defect's starter. The initial Lightning orb provides early damage while Dark orbs charge.

best.name: Gold-Plated Cables
best.note: Rightmost orb triggers passive twice. Position a Dark orb rightmost and it charges double per turn.

best.name: Data Disk
best.note: +1 Focus at start of combat. Dark orbs gain 7 damage per turn instead of 6. Multiplied over 5+ turns.

good.name: Runic Capacitor
good.note: 3 extra Orb slots. Room for both Dark orbs and Frost orbs simultaneously.

good.name: Mummified Hand
good.note: Free card plays after Powers. Chain Defragment + Darkness + Echo Form cheaply.

good.name: Anchor
good.note: 10 Block at combat start. Buys a turn to channel Dark orbs before needing to defend.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Setup turns require many card plays. The 6-card limit prevents proper Multi-Cast burst turns.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: +1 Strength to enemies while you spend turns charging. Dangerous compounding damage.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Gold is crucial for purchasing Defragment and Multi-Cast from shops.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Cracked Core
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Gold-Plated Cables
key_relics_sidebar.note: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.

builds.title: Defect Creative AI Build
builds.description: Let an AI generate your deck for you. Creative AI adds a random Power to your hand each turn, creating an ever-expanding engine of passive effects. Combined with Storm (channel Lightning per Power played) and Echo Form, the build snowballs into an unstoppable cascade of orbs, buffs, and passive damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Creative AI
card_acquisition_priority.note: Generate a random Power each turn. The core engine that makes the entire build work.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Echo Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play the first card each turn twice. Double Creative AI's generated Power, double orb generation, double everything.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Storm
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Lightning whenever you play a Power. Free orbs every time Creative AI triggers.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Machine Learning
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 1 extra card per turn permanently. Essential for finding and playing generated Powers.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Defragment
card_acquisition_priority.note: +1 Focus. Makes all orbs from Storm significantly more powerful.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Capacitor
card_acquisition_priority.note: +2-3 Orb slots. Storm generates lots of Lightning orbs — need slots to hold them.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Buffer
card_acquisition_priority.note: Negate next damage instance. Insurance during the 3-4 setup turns before Creative AI.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Coolheaded
card_acquisition_priority.note: Channel Frost + draw. Defense and cycle in one card.

best.name: Mummified Hand
best.note: After playing a Power, a random card in hand costs 0. Since Creative AI gives you Powers each turn, this triggers constantly.

best.name: Cracked Core
best.note: Defect's starter. Free Lightning orb turn 1 provides early damage while building toward Creative AI.

best.name: Bird Faced Urn
best.note: Heal 2 HP whenever you play a Power. With 1-3 Powers per turn, this provides substantial healing.

good.name: Data Disk
good.note: +1 Focus at combat start. Free bonus that improves every orb for the entire fight.

good.name: Inserter
good.note: Extra Orb slot every 2 turns. More slots for all the Lightning orbs Storm generates.

good.name: Ice Cream
good.note: Conserve Energy between turns. Save Energy during low-activity turns for big Power-chaining turns.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Power turns often involve playing 5-7 cards (Creative AI's Power + Storm orb + other Powers). 6-card limit is restrictive.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: The 3-4 setup turns before Creative AI comes online are vulnerable. Extra enemy Strength is dangerous.

avoid.name: Cursed Key
avoid.note: Curses in deck dilute card draw. Harder to find Creative AI and setup pieces.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Mummified Hand
key_relics_sidebar.note: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your Hand is free to play that turn.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Cracked Core
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning.
